name: LENNAR CORP /NEW/
business: Lennar is one of the largest homebuilders in the United States, constructing and selling single-family attached and detached homes, and also providing mortgage financing, title insurance, closing services, and multifamily rental property development. The company sells homes primarily targeted to first-time, move-up, active adult, and luxury homebuyers.

exposures.sentence: Our homebuilding operations are the most substantial part of our business, generating $32 billion in revenues, or approximately 94% of consolidated revenues, in fiscal 2025.
We also believe in the value of clean energy from solar power, and we consistently seek opportunities to integrate solar power where it provides great value for our homebuyers.
Most of our homes include home automation and technology components, as well as energy efficient materials and systems, which enhances our brand.
We also have investments in companies that are engaged in applying technology to improve the homebuilding industry and real estate related aspects of the financial services industry.

concerns about job security have become increasingly prominent as advancements in modern technology and artificial intelligence raise important questions about the future of employment for the American workforce.

catalysts.event: Expect to deliver approximately 85,000 homes in fiscal 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect to deliver approximately 85,000 homes in the full 2026 fiscal year.

catalysts.event: Expect first quarter fiscal 2026 margins between 15% and 16%
catalysts.sentence: we expect our margins in the first quarter of 2026 will be between 15% and 16%, depending on market conditions.

catalysts.event: Sold majority interest in Quarterra Group to TPG Real Estate
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we sold a majority interest in Quarterra Group, Inc ("Quarterra"), a subsidiary of our Multifamily segment, to TPG Real Estate ( TPG ), thus retaining a minority interest.
